design_philosophy: Minimalist sci-fi/Iron-Man inspired interface for 'Project Inception'. True black backgrounds, soft glowing neon outlines, crisp thin typography, and generous spacing. High contrast for accessibility. Pure structural hierarchy avoiding decorative slop.

header.layout: Row, space-between, items-center. Top margin respecting safe area.
header.logo: Text 'PROJECT INCEPTION' in Rajdhani, uppercase, tracking-widest (letterSpacing: 3). Icon: Ionicons 'globe-outline' thin neon ring to the left.
header.live_indicator: Small dot (green accent) with text 'LIVE' in mono text-xs top-right.

stock_ticker_card.layout: Horizontal row of 3 cards. Flex: 1 for each, space between.
stock_ticker_card.content: Ticker symbol (AAPL), percentage change (+2.3% in green or -1.1% in red), tiny SVG sparkline using react-native-svg.

jarvis_avatar.visual: Multiple concentric circles using react-native-svg. Reanimated for continuous slow rotation and pulse. Inner glow using expo-linear-gradient radially or overlapping SVG shapes with opacity.

speech_bubble.layout: Rounded rectangle with a small SVG tail pointing left towards JARVIS.
speech_bubble.style: Background #141414, border 1px solid rgba(212, 255, 0, 0.3), borderRadius 16px, padding 16px.
speech_bubble.text: Neon green-yellow type (#D4FF00), Space Grotesk font.
speech_bubble.position: Center right, flex: 1, next to JARVIS avatar

action_card.style: Background #000000, border 1px solid #27272A, borderRadius 16px, padding 16px. Flex: 1.
action_card.glow: Subtle inner glow on icon via SVG filters or layered absolute positioned gradients.

bottom_nav.layout: Floating action bar or thumb-friendly bottom nav.
bottom_nav.blur: Use expo-blur (BlurView, tint='dark') if available, else solid dark.

structure: Full screen pure black background.
Center: Animated JARVIS orb (scaling up, glowing).
Text: 'PROJECT INCEPTION' fading in below.
Status: 'Initializing secure connection...' in mono font.
Header: Logo + Globe Icon + Live Indicator
Top Row: 3 Stock Ticker Cards (AAPL, TSLA, NVDA)
Center Section: JARVIS Avatar + Speech Bubble ('Good morning Architect...')
Bottom Row: 3 Action Cards (Create Document, Stock Tracker, Talk to Jarvis)
Bottom: iOS home indicator safe area inset
Header: Back button, JARVIS status (Online - Green Dot)
Scrollable area: Chat history (User messages right, JARVIS messages left with small orbital icon)
Footer: Voice input button (Hold-to-speak in center, pulsing glow), text input field, send button
Header: 'Create Document' + Back button
Form: Multiline prompt input area (border glowing on focus)
Options: Segmented control/Toggle for PDF vs PowerPoint
Action: 'Generate Document' button with neon primary background or outline glow
Header: 'Market Overview' + Back button
Tabs: Hourly, Quarterly views (using neon accent underline for active tab)
List: Watchlist stocks with expanded sparklines, current price, and AI buy/sell recommendations in accent colors
Detail View (Modal/Push): Full interactive chart, major world news feed mapped to tracked stock
Header: 'Library' + Back button
List: Generated PDFs/PPTs cards with document icon, title, timestamp
Actions per card: Share, Delete, Open (using standard vector icons)
Header: 'Settings' + Back button
Section: Accessibility (Voice Narration Toggle for Blind users, Screen Reader Mode)
Section: Watchlist Management (Add/Remove tickers)
Section: Display/Theme (Keep Dark Sci-Fi locked, but maybe toggle animations)

animations.jarvisOrb: Use react-native-reanimated for withRepeat and withTiming to continuously rotate outer SVG rings and pulse scale.
animations.sparklines: Draw-in path animation using react-native-reanimated on mount.
animations.buttons: Slight scale down on press (withSpring) for tactile feedback.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure >= 4.5:1 ratio against pure black background.
accessibility.voiceNarration: Explicit support for blind users via TTS toggle. Use accessible={true}, accessibilityLabel, and accessibilityRole props on all elements.
accessibility.testIds: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute for automated testing.

libraries_and_tools.svg: react-native-svg for shapes, sparklines, JARVIS orb
libraries_and_tools.gradients: expo-linear-gradient for subtle glowing accents only

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement strict React Native Expo components following this design guide. Focus heavily on layout precision, spacing, and glowing sci-fi aesthetics using SVG and reanimated. Do NOT use web HTML/CSS. Use StyleSheet.create for styling. Ensure all elements have data-testid attributes.
